modes.name: solo
modes.description: One skill handles the whole request. Default behavior.

modes.name: assist
modes.description: Primary skill owns the work; may ask another skill for a second opinion.

modes.name: flow
modes.description: Skills chain in a predefined order; each step hands off cleanly to the next.

depths.name: brief
depths.description: Quick answer, decision, or pointer. Default depth.

depths.name: report
depths.description: Structured findings with context, recommendations, and next actions.

depths.name: deep
depths.description: Full exploration with alternatives, evidence, and implementation detail.
